/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ppe.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ppe.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe.dir/src/cli/command_router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe.dir/src/modules/power_supply.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe.dir/src/modules/symmetric_supply.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe.dir/src/modules/antenna.cpp.o -o ppe  libppe_core.a
